name: Payment
summary: Payment processing domain covering RPC facade exposure and fund capture workflows.

flows.name: Process Payment
flows.summary: Initiates and completes payment for a confirmed order via MOA RPC

steps.name: Authorize Payment
steps.description: Authorizes the payment amount with the external payment provider

steps.name: Capture Funds
steps.description: Captures authorized funds after order confirmation is received

steps.name: Notify Order Service
steps.description: Sends payment completion result back to the order management domain
